CVE-2022-23451.title: An authorization flaw was found in openstack-barbican. The defaul ...
CVE-2022-23451.summary: An authorization flaw was found in openstack-barbican. The default policy rules for the secret metadata API allowed any authenticated user to add, modify, or delete metadata from any secret regardless of ownership. This flaw allows an attacker on the network to modify or delete protected data, causing a denial of service by consuming protected resources.

CVE-2022-23452.title: An authorization flaw was found in openstack-barbican, where anyo ...
CVE-2022-23452.summary: An authorization flaw was found in openstack-barbican, where anyone with an admin role could add secrets to a different project container. This flaw allows an attacker on the network to consume protected resources and cause a denial of service.

CVE-2022-3100.title: A flaw was found in the openstack-barbican component. This issue  ...
CVE-2022-3100.summary: A flaw was found in the openstack-barbican component. This issue allows an access policy bypass via a query string when accessing the API.
